temporaryNotice.title: Notice
temporaryNotice.message: This legal content is placeholder boilerplate and should be reviewed by qualified legal counsel before publication.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: RECSEEKERS respects your privacy. This page explains what personal data we collect, why we collect it, and how we handle it.

sections.heading: Who We Are
paragraphs: RECSEEKERS is a specialist recruiter-to-recruiter business focused on education recruitment.
For data protection matters, contact us through the contact details shown on this website.

sections.heading: What We Collect
paragraphs: We may collect identity and contact information you submit through forms.
We may also collect basic usage data to keep the site secure and improve performance.
bullets: Name and contact details (e.g., email address, phone number)
Message, role-related information, and hiring timelines

sections.heading: How We Use Data
paragraphs: We use personal data to respond to enquiries, assess relevant opportunities, and improve our services. If you opt-in to our newsletter, we will also use your email address to send you industry updates and relevant content. We only process data where there is a lawful basis to do so.

sections.heading: Third-Party Services and Marketing
paragraphs: We use HubSpot as our Customer Relationship Management (CRM) and email marketing platform. When you submit a form or sign up for our newsletter, the details you provide are transferred to and stored securely within HubSpot. You can unsubscribe from our marketing communications at any time by clicking the "Unsubscribe" link at the bottom of our emails.

sections.heading: Your Rights
paragraphs: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, erase, or restrict use of your personal data.
To exercise these rights, or to withdraw your consent for marketing communications, contact us and we will respond within applicable legal timelines.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: These terms govern use of the RECSEEKERS website. By using this site, you agree to these terms.

sections.heading: Website Use
paragraphs: You agree to use this website lawfully and not to interfere with site operations.
Content is provided for general information and may change without notice.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
paragraphs: Unless otherwise stated, website content, branding, and design are owned by RECSEEKERS or licensed to RECSEEKERS.
You may not reproduce or distribute site content without written permission.

sections.heading: Liability
paragraphs: We aim to keep information accurate and up to date, but we do not guarantee completeness or suitability for every purpose.
To the extent permitted by law, RECSEEKERS is not liable for indirect or consequential loss arising from website use.

sections.heading: Changes and Contact
paragraphs: We may update these terms from time to time by publishing a revised version on this page.
Questions about these terms can be sent via the website contact form.
